titleStmt.title: SII 41.185: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 185. (A.R. No. 403 of 1905.) Kāvēripākkam, Arakkōṇam Taluk, North Arcot District. On a slab setup in front of the masjid at Kāvēripākkam,

p.hi: Qutb Shah, Sultān Abdulla Pātaśāha, Śaka 1591, Kīlaka, Margaśira, Su 10, Friday = November 22, 1669 A.D.

summary.p: In Telugu language and script. Records the building of the masjid at Kāvēripāka in Killē Pargaṇa. It is said the construction was started in Hijri 1077 and completed in 1078. At the top of the slab is an inscription in Persian, a counterpart of the present inscription. [This is discussed elaborately by Z.A. Desai in ‘A Note on the Telugu Inscription of Abdulla Qutb Shah from Kaveripakkam’, Śrinidhih = Shri K.R. Srinivasan Festschrift, 1983, pp. 311-22.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
varttamānavyvahārikē kīlaka
nāma saṃvatsara mārggaśira
śudha . 10 . śukravāraṃ varku
śālivāhana śaka varushaṃ
bulagu 1591 Agu nēṭi
dinamuku rājyādhipati
śāhajaṃjāhamalāya
sāha sulutānu Abdula
pa*taśahatā du nava*
bu nāmukhānurajākhullichē
gunaratanarāgilōna pharukhullivala
duhājapa nihāhīluvāru killē pa
ragaṇē kāvēripāka kaṭṭṃchchina maśīduna
kilā . vakhānisna 1077 yēḍu modalu
koni 1078 yiṃdumustayidu Āya
nu
Digital edition of SII 41.185 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
